# Enchiridion

*[Epictetus](../philosophers/epictetus.md) · 125*

A short collection of [Epictetus](../philosophers/epictetus.md)'s precepts compiled by his pupil Arrian, the Enchiridion condenses the essentials of Stoic ethics into a few pages. It opens with the [distinction between what is up to us and what is not](../glossary/dichotomy-of-control.md), the guiding thread of all practical wisdom.
